ai_summary: Gillanders Arbuthnot & Co. Ltd. successfully convened its 92nd Annual General Meeting on July 3, 2026, where members considered the adoption of FY2026 financial statements, with both Statutory and Secretarial Auditors' reports containing no qualifications or adverse remarks. A material impact is the proposed approval of dividends on 7.75% Cumulative Redeemable Preference Shares for the financial years 2018-19 and 2019-20, signaling the clearing of several years of accumulated preference dividend arrears. While not a direct red flag, this significant delay in addressing these past dividends indicates a historical financial context or deferred payment strategy now being resolved.
